headline: CONFIRMATION. April 20 California AG Bonta unsealed evidence in pending antitrust suit showing Amazon directed brand partners (Levi's, Hanes) and rival retailers (Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Home Depot, Chewy) to inflate prices on competing platforms. Specific evidence of collusive communications. Trial scheduled 2027 — current event is evidentiary unsealing, not adjudication. Live composite 17.8 (Critical band) already deeply reflects accumulated negative evidence base (warehouse labor practices, Bessemer/Staten Island unionization fights, Ring/Rekognition surveillance, antitrust history). Sub-5pt EMP/INT calibration available but does not cross threshold; not floor-limited (expressive room remains).

evidence.finding: Unredacted evidence in pending antitrust lawsuit — Amazon directed brands and retailers to inflate prices on rival platforms; specific collusive communications documented.

post_trial_re_queue: Re-queue mandatory at 2027 antitrust trial verdict.
